# GEN101 Research Dossier (fixture)

A generic dossier used by tests to satisfy the hardened `authored` gate (≥5 cited URLs + confidence
tags + an open-questions section).

## Canonical curriculum
- Introduction to Algorithms (CLRS) · https://mitpress.mit.edu/clrs · the canonical text · confidence: high.
- MIT OCW 6.006 Introduction to Algorithms · https://ocw.mit.edu/6-006 · top-university curriculum · confidence: high.
- Stanford CS161 · https://stanford-cs161.github.io · corroborates the topic sequence · confidence: medium.

## Excellence bar & expert practices
- Competitive-programming communities · https://codeforces.com · how the best keep sharpening · confidence: medium.
- Google Tech Dev Guide · https://techdevguide.withgoogle.com · industry-bar problem sets · confidence: medium.

## Best materials
- The Algorithm Design Manual (Skiena) · https://www.algorist.com · practitioner favorite · confidence: high.

## Open Questions / Couldn't Verify
- Whether CLRS or Skiena is the better primary for a self-learner — sources split; left as owner choice.
